## Headline state

`width3_one_third_two_thirds` (`lean/OneThird/MainTheorem.lean:52-57`) currently carries `hC3 : Step8.Case3Witness` — a Prop-level hypothesis that the paper's `thm:main` does not. The second in-tree axiom (`case3Witness_hasBalancedPair_outOfScope`) is **not** in the headline's transitive closure under the current hC3-conditional shape.

The PATH B (drop hC3) iteration was **PARKED** on 2026-04-27 via the η₅ pre-committed pivot (mg-b0de status doc 8f97133). Resumption requires either (a) the deferred A8-S2-cont probability-form FKG monotonicity (~2000-3500 LoC, future-cycle math-simplification roadmap item per Daniel's 2026-04-27 directive), or (b) a Daniel-OVERRIDE.

The (L2) gap diagnosed in `docs/a5-g2-status.md` was **RESOLVED via path 1** on 2026-04-29 23:51 (mg-53ce + mg-651f, landed at 87daf24): `LayeredDecomposition` gained the `cross_band_lt_upward` field, the three real instance-construction sites were updated (`restrict`, `Step8.trivialLayered`, `Step8.layeredFromBridges`), and the obligation-discharge in `bounded_irreducible_balanced_inScope` was inlined. Status doc has been rewritten to reflect resolution; no follow-on docs sweep needed.
